reason: Ready: SymbolKey resolver (Class/Func/Assign/AnnAssign/single-alias/facade-both-shapes) + live collision classifier (>=2 fail-close, re-derived) + fail-closed None-key; 37 unit tests incl DoD-j invariance + perf-budget; ruff+mypy clean.

review.reference: Review PASSED (opus/reviewer-renata). All 8 make-or-break criteria verified against real code+canonical sources. (1) NOT bare-name-alone: SymbolKey always carries body_hash; byte-identical same-name collisions escalate to module_path via live key_tier or fail-close — T004 no-false-negative preserved. (2) AnnAssign branch present (definition_span L171-174); <=14 typed constants keyable+hashable; whitespace-invariance tested. (3) Facade by-shape: _facade_target handles BOTH sync 2-tuple _LAZY_IMPORTS AND runtime 1-value _EXPORT_MODULES (the shape gate's _record_facade_edges len!=2 SKIPS); _record_facade_edges untouched (empty git log); 2 pure helpers imported via function-local deferred import — no circular load. (4) Single-alias hash scoped to the one ast.alias's own columns; sibling-edit immunity tested. (5) Live classifier: classify_collisions re-derives bare_name->[Location] index every call from corpus, NOT frozen — proven by test_dod_i catching a NEW non-ArtifactKind byte-identical pair. (6) Fail-closed: None-key + >=2-resolution both return None; no 'if key is None: exempt'. (7) body_hash reuses code_tokens_by_line (no forked normalizer). (8) test under tests/unit/ w/ pytest.mark.unit, DoD-j invariance + perf-budget. 37 passed, ruff+mypy clean, only 2 owned files touched.

reason: Ready: tier-specific dangling ratchet (content=body_hash->0, module_path=(name,module)->0); body edit -> ONE signal; bite (b,d,g) through production path; gate-side DoD-j 0-false-red; full arch 0-failed; C-005 byte-unchanged

review.reference: APPROVED (reviewer-renata/opus). (1) Tier-specific dangling ratchet correct: content-tier=(bare_name,body_hash)->0 live in classify_collisions index; module_path-tier=(bare_name,module_path)->no live __all__ decl, body_hash correctly ignored (relocation forfeit). (2) One-signal reconciliation SOUND and adequately guarded: bare_name suppression is a theoretical masking vector but (a) safe-direction - never suppresses an offender, so the gate can NEVER go falsely green (a coincidental same-named offender keeps assert red anyway); (b) self-healing - suppression only holds while a same-named offender coexists, dangling entry re-surfaces once the offender clears; (c) structurally necessary since the content tier is deliberately location-free. Cannot permanently hide a dangling entry nor blind dead-code detection. (3) All 5 new tests drive production _compute_offenders/_compute_stale/_compute_dangling (C-007), not a standalone key-fn; (g) reds both tiers + proves body-edit->one-signal (exercises the suppression path); (b) relocated-but-wired green; (d) reds stale on both tiers body-independently; (j)-gate 0-false-red for AnnAssign-whitespace + single-alias relocation. (4) C-005: only test_no_dead_symbols.py changed; _compute_stale extraction byte-identical to inline loop except _SYMBOL_ALLOWLIST->param; real-corpus main gate test green. (5) No new /tmp literals. ruff+mypy clean; 5 new tests + main gate green. Low-sev note: masking window logged for record, not a blocker.
